fields.heading: Care Staffing PSL Partnership
fields.sub: At Vigil Care Staffing, we don't just provide care staff—we help your service run better. When you add us to your PSL, you get priority access to qualified staff plus free weekly planning tools built for inspections, team wellbeing, and smoother handovers.

image.alt: a blue and white document with white text

fields.image_alt: a blue and white document with white text

fields.heading: Care Staffing PSL Partnership in London
fields.body: No other agency offers this kind of workforce support at no extra cost. We've created real-time templates for supervision, buddying, safeguarding, and onboarding—so your team stays ready, and your records do the talking.

image.alt: Vigil Care Staffing document titled Staffing Evidence Builder with a table of 12 quick wins and manager's notes.

fields.image_alt: Vigil Care Staffing document titled Staffing Evidence Builder with a table of 12 quick wins and manager's notes.

fields.heading: Get Started with Our Partner Toolkit
fields.body: Our PSL partner toolkit includes essential resources to support your work. Explore tools like: Safeguarding Readiness Checklist Buddying & Induction Logs Supervision Templates Onboarding Audit Sheets Workforce Planning Dashboards These resources are designed to streamline processes and enhance effectiveness.

items.title: Tailored Workforce Solutions
items.body: Access a workforce that meets your specific needs, ensuring that you have the right staff in place when you need them.

items.title: Ongoing Support
items.body: Our team provides continuous support to help you navigate staffing challenges, ensuring you're never alone.

items.title: Quality Assurance
items.body: We prioritise quality in our staffing solutions, helping to elevate patient care standards across the board.

fields.heading: Why Choose Vigil Care Staffing?
fields.body: At Vigil Care Staffing, we're more than just a service provider; we're your partners in delivering outstanding care. With our deep industry knowledge, extensive resources, and focus on quality, we make sure your facility is prepared for the ever-evolving healthcare needs.

items.title: Dedicated Support
items.body: You'll have direct access to a dedicated account manager who knows your needs and is always ready to help.

items.title: Compliance Help
items.body: Strategic resources aligned to CQC Single Assessment Framework

items.title: Custom Staffing
items.body: Pre-vetted staff matched to your ethos

items.title: Supported Living
items.body: We provide compassionate support for individuals living with diverse needs, ensuring they receive tailored care in a safe environment.

items.title: Residential Care
items.body: Our dedicated team offers a warm and inviting atmosphere for residents, fostering comfort and security while promoting independence.

items.title: Cleaners
items.body: Our cleaning staff are fully trained in health and social care cleaning procedures, ensuring your care environment stays hygienic, safe, and compliant.

items.title: Emergency Staffing
items.body: We offer prompt emergency staffing solutions to ensure that your care services are always adequately supported.

fields.heading: What our partners say
fields.body: Vigil Care Staffing provided exceptional support during our staffing crisis. Their quick response and professionalism made all the difference in maintaining our services.

items.q: What is a Care Staffing PSL partnership—and why should we consider one?
items.a: A PSL (Preferred Supplier List) partnership with Vigil means your service recognises us as a trusted provider of care staff. But beyond availability, it unlocks strategic benefits: weekly planning tools, audit templates, and priority access to values-aligned staff. It's not just about filling shifts—it's about strengthening your workforce and inspection readiness.

We primarily serve the health and social care sector across various settings, including residential care, hospices, and home care environments throughout London, specifically in boroughs like Barking, Hackney, Tower Hamlets, Newham, and Redbridge.

items.q: What kind of staffing cover do PSL partners receive?
items.a: PSL partners receive priority access to our vetted pool of: Support Workers Healthcare Assistants Night Cover and Emergency Fill-in Staff We serve services in Barking, Hackney, Tower Hamlets, Newham, and Greater London—including hospital discharge teams and supported living homes.

Our service rates vary based on the specific requirements and urgency of your staffing needs. We offer competitive pricing tailored to your situation, ensuring you receive the best support possible. Please contact us for a detailed quote.

items.q: How do Vigil's PSL resources support CQC Single Assessment Framework outcomes?
items.a: Each toolkit item maps directly to a CQC domain: Buddying logs support "Safe" (learning culture) Supervision templates support "Effective" (staff development) Workforce dashboards support "Well-led" (planning & leadership) We help you surface real evidence from routine records—so inspections reflect what's already working.

items.q: Is there a cost to join Vigil's Care Staffing PSL?
items.a: No. There's no charge for inclusion on our PSL or for access to the weekly workforce tools. We offer this as a value-added partnership because better planning supports better care—and we're invested in your long-term success.

fields.heading: Join Our PSL Partnership
fields.sub: Are you ready to elevate your care service? At Vigil Care Staffing, we welcome you to join our PSL partnership. Gain access to top-notch staffing tools, dedicated support, and a flow of qualified professionals tailored to your needs.
